allow: PowerShell($paths = "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe"; foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $edge = "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe"; & $edge --headless=new --disable-gpu --hide-scrollbars --window-size="900,1100" --virtual-time-budget=4000 --screenshot="$env:TEMP\\sb_savings_page.png" "http://127.0.0.1:8099/savings" 2>$null | Out-Null; Get-Item "$env:TEMP\\sb_savings_page.png" | Select-Object Length)

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8099 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $conn | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "Killing PID $\($_.OwningProcess\)"; Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -Confirm:$false } } else { Write-Output "port free" })
